name: Cheddar Mushroom Open-Face Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the mushrooms in the butter until tender.
2. Remove from the heat and stir in the egg and oregano.
3. Stir in the cheddar cheese.
4. Spread about 3 tablespoons of the mixture on each slice of toast.
5. Top each slice with 2 slices of tomato.
6. Sprinkle with celery salt to taste.
7. Broil for 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts and the sandwich is thoroughly heated.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve.
